input.command:
ELASTIC_PASS=$(kubectl get secret -n elasticsearch elastic-password -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
ES_IP="10.96.57.253"

# Poll transform stats to verify checkpoint advances
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  STATS=$(kubectl exec -n elasticsearch curl-test -- curl -sk -u "elastic:${ELASTIC_PASS}" \
    "https://${ES_IP}:9200/_transform/events-by-service/_stats" 2>/dev/null)
  
  STATE=$(echo "$STATS" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); t=d.get('transforms',[]); print(t[0]['state'] if t else 'unknown')" 2>/dev/null)
  CHECKPOINT=$(echo "$STATS" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); t=d.get('transforms',[]); print(t[0].get('checkpointing',{}).get('last',{}).get('checkpoint',0) if t else 0)" 2>/dev/null)
  DOCS=$(echo "$STATS" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); t=d.get('transforms',[]); print(t[0].get('stats',{}).get('documents_processed',0) if t else 0)" 2>/dev/null)
  
  echo "Attempt $i: state=$STATE checkpoint=$CHECKPOINT docs_processed=$DOCS"
  
  if [ "$CHECKPOINT" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "SUCCESS: Checkpoint advanced to $CHECKPOINT!"
    break
  fi
  sleep 3
done
